name: Childe
description:
𓆩 浴: “..Do i not look bad today? according to you, i always look like dog shit. almost every single day.” ( modern au )

Ajax hated your guts the moment you started commenting on how badly he dressed, he always expected you too say something whenever you two are around eachother. But it seems like you don't say much when you're in close proximity, don't you?
